summary: Classified five open PR inventory items independently. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix action is recommended, and no security-sensitive item was identified in the hydrated preflight artifact.

actions.reason: Independent open contributor PR with useful code and failing proof/check gates; keep it in the normal PR review lane rather than closing or inventing a canonical.
Independent draft PR with supplied proof; draft state and missing hydrated canonical prevent close or merge planning.
Independent focused Telegram PR with useful code and one failing proof lane; keep it for normal validation rather than closeout.
Independent draft feature PR with broad scope and failed proof; keep it out of cleanup closure and leave it in maintainer/author review flow.
Independent provider-compatibility bug fix PR with useful code and failed gates; keep it for normal review/repair outside this close-only inventory shard.
